evidence_refs.anchor_text: Medivation had conducted a lengthy and thorough process, directed by our Board of Directors, during which representatives of Medivation contacted 15 parti

unresolved_mentions: The 'three industry participants' and 'a fourth industry participant' in B006 may correspond to the later four late-March companies, but the filing does not map each early mention to Company 1-4 individually.
The 'one additional party' in B047 is unnamed at that point and could be one of Company 1-4, but the text does not specify which one.

The 'fourth industry participant' in B055 and 'fifth industry participant' in B056 appear to complete the set later labeled Company 1-4 plus Pfizer, but the filing does not identify which Company number corresponds to each execution date.
The grouped actor 'eleven industry participants' overlaps with Pfizer and the four late-March companies; it should not be treated as a unique non-overlapping bidder set.
The count assertion of 15 parties contacted in B090 exceeds the 12 industry participants described in B045; the additional parties are not individually identified in the supplied text.
